top_risks.title: Oil Price Fluctuations
evidence: Norse Atlantic ASA cuts LA flights due to high jet fuel costs
Oil supplies tightened due to war in Iran
top_risks.causal_chain: War in Iran → Oil supply disruptions → High jet fuel costs → Flight cancellations
top_risks.recommended_action: Diversify fuel sources and consider hedging against price volatility

top_risks.title: Tariff Impacts
evidence: Student lender's securitization push falters due to Trump visa curbs
top_risks.recommended_action: Monitor tariff developments and adjust supply chain strategies accordingly

top_risks.title: Recession Fears
evidence: Economic instability due to tariffs and war
top_risks.causal_chain: Economic instability → Recession fears → Reduced consumer spending
top_risks.recommended_action: Diversify investments and maintain a flexible supply chain

top_risks.title: Gold Price Fluctuations
evidence: Gold price fallen about 9% since the start of the war
top_risks.causal_chain: War → Gold price fluctuations → Investment uncertainty
top_risks.recommended_action: Monitor gold price developments and adjust investment strategies

top_risks.title: Global Weather Patterns
evidence: Broken clouds and overcast clouds in major cities
top_risks.causal_chain: Weather patterns → Flight disruptions → Supply chain delays
top_risks.recommended_action: Monitor weather forecasts and adjust logistics plans accordingly

soft_risks.title: Public Sentiment
soft_risks.note: Negative sentiment on social media platforms regarding economic policies and trade disruptions

soft_risks.title: Visa Curbs
soft_risks.note: Trump visa curbs affecting student lenders and international students

soft_risks.title: Investor Confidence
soft_risks.note: Investors expressing concerns about market volatility and economic instability

data_quality_note: The intelligence bundle has a layer1 completeness of 75% and an average reliability of 0.93, indicating a moderate level of confidence in the data. However, the lack of data in the stocks and ports sections may impact the accuracy of the analysis.
